hooks.command: echo '## FRIDAY Context Loaded' && echo '---' && echo '### Hot Memory' && cat memory/hot-memory.md 2>/dev/null | head -60 && echo '---' && echo '### Recent Corrections' && cat memory/patterns/corrections.md 2>/dev/null | tail -20 && echo '---' && echo '### Boundaries' && cat memory/patterns/boundaries.md 2>/dev/null | grep -A2 'must escalate' && echo '---' && echo '### Inbox' && wc -l inbox/braindump.md 2>/dev/null | awk '{if($1>5) print $1-5" unprocessed items in inbox"; else print "Inbox empty"}' && echo '---' && echo '### Git Status' && git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -5

hooks.prompt: Before ending: Did you learn anything new this session that should be saved? If yes, identify which memory file to update (corrections, preferences, strategies, hot-memory, ads-history, business-knowledge, or entities). State the file and the update in one sentence. If nothing new was learned, say 'No memory updates needed.'
